claim.statement: A quantized 2-layer ReLU network has no adversarial example in the input box [-1,1]^2: class 0 strictly beats class 1 for every input in the box (net_robust).
claim.negation_of: an input in [-1,1]^2 at which class 1 >= class 0 (an adversarial example)

rung.name: kernel-checked
trusted_base: no compiler, no external program -- a kernel-checked proof object

meta.method: integer interval bound propagation (dot_interval / affine_sound / relu_sound), proved over-approximating; margin lower bound stays positive on the whole box

provenance.pipeline: Lean 4 formalization; #print axioms audit is the trust boundary

one_directional: The checker certifies only if the theorem elaborates AND its axiom set exactly equals the declared trusted base; any extra axiom (a silent rung-slide) or a failed build fails closed.
